site_content.content_value: Galam Pedia & OB Clinic
Your Health, Our Priority

Galam Pedia & Ob Clinic is a trusted medical facility dedicated to providing exceptional healthcare services for families. With experienced pediatric and OB-GYN specialists, we deliver compassionate, patient-centered care in a modern, welcoming environment.

Founded in 2010, Galam Pedia & Ob Clinic has grown from a small family practice into a comprehensive healthcare center serving thousands of patients in our community. Our commitment to excellence and patient satisfaction has made us a preferred choice for families seeking quality medical care.
To provide accessible, high-quality healthcare services that improve the health and well-being of every patient we serve, with compassion, integrity, and excellence.
To be the leading community healthcare clinic recognized for outstanding patient care, innovative medical practices, and a commitment to healthier families.
Experienced specialists, modern facilities, patient-centered approach, convenient online booking, and a warm, family-friendly environment.
State-of-the-art examination rooms, digital diagnostic equipment, comfortable waiting areas, private consultation rooms, and child-friendly pediatric spaces.
We believe every patient deserves personalized attention. Our team takes time to listen, explain treatment options clearly, and involve patients in their healthcare decisions.
Bontoc Southern Leyte
galam_clinic@health.com

Monday - Friday: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Saturday: 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM
Sunday: Closed
